streams.pump_role: single feed containing all reagents premixed in DES
streams.reasoning: From Chemistry Plan stream_logic: All components premixed in DES at room temperature since no reaction occurs below 120°C. Single stream simplifies pumping of viscous DES. Concentration adjusted from batch 0.5 M to 0.0667 M based on calculation results for optimal residence time.

mixing_order_reasoning: From Chemistry Plan: Single feed stream eliminates need for mixing. Both substrates premixed in DES at room temperature since cycloaddition requires 120°C to generate nitrile oxide intermediate.
chemistry_notes: Thermal 1,3-dipolar cycloaddition proceeding via in-situ nitrile oxide generation from ethyl nitroacetate at 120°C followed by [3+2] cycloaddition with phenylacetylene. Rate-limiting step is thermal dehydration/tautomerization to form nitrile oxide. DES viscosity requires careful pump selection - may need heated feed lines or gear pumps. BPR essential to prevent solvent volatilization and maintain liquid phase at 120°C. No light source needed as this is purely thermal chemistry.

reasoning_per_field.residence_time_min: Calculation estimated 60.0 min (range 1.0-90.0 min) via analogy. Analogy 3 used 20 min for [3+2] cycloaddition but at lower temperature (60°C vs 120°C). Using 60 min to ensure complete nitrile oxide generation and cycloaddition at our higher temperature.
reasoning_per_field.temperature_C: Same as batch (120°C) - required for thermal nitrile oxide generation from ethyl nitroacetate. Analogies used lower temperatures but different substrates.
reasoning_per_field.BPR_bar: Calculation: required 5.0 bar. Gas-liquid system detected - BPR mandatory to maintain liquid phase at 120°C and prevent uncontrolled degassing.
reasoning_per_field.tubing_material: PFA for high temperature resistance (120°C) and chemical compatibility with DES. Not photochemistry so transparency not needed.
reasoning_per_field.concentration_M: Calculation result: 0.0667 M in reactor (diluted from batch 0.5 M). Analogy 1 used 0.5 M but different solvent system.
reasoning_per_field.flow_rate_mL_min: Calculation: 0.5 mL/min total to achieve 60 min residence time in 30 mL reactor volume.
reasoning_per_field.reactor_volume_mL: Calculation: 30.0 mL based on residence time and flow rate requirements. Matches Analogy 1 reactor volume.
reasoning_per_field.tubing_ID_mm: Calculation: 1.0 mm for optimal heat transfer and pressure drop. Analogy 2 used similar dimensions for high-temperature operation.
